hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Eleventh project type (sync protocol + conflict resolution). All gates first pass. 4 atomic commits. Fastest sprint (4m 59s).

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: Gates passed first try. 171 E2E passed. No regressions. Conflict resolution tests verify convergence.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: 5/5 instructions compliant. Sync via Megolm. Same applyEvent conflict rules. Optimistic UI. Event convergence. Sync indicator.
